task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the Payment window in iDempiere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface should display the 'Payment' window or tab as the active screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Business Partner is set to Joe Block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Business Partner' field in the Payment window should contain the value 'Joe Block'.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment is configured as an AR Receipt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Receipt' checkbox should be checked, or the Document Type field should explicitly indicate an 'AR Receipt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment amount is set to $1,750.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payment Amount' or 'Amount' field should display '1750' or '1,750.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the tender type is Check and the correct check number is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Tender Type' dropdown should be set to 'Check' and the 'Check No' or 'Routing No' field should contain '20251547'.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment document has been processed to a 'Completed' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Document Status' field should display 'Completed' (or 'CO'), and the record should appear saved (e.g., grayed out fields or a success message in the status bar).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere graphical user interface in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser navigating the iDempiere ERP interface, not a terminal, API testing tool, or database console.

integrity.description: Verify the inputs were entered into the actual iDempiere application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values (Joe Block, 1750.00, 20251547) must be entered into the corresponding form fields within the iDempiere UI, not just typed into a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the UI appears genuine and not artificially modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The iDempiere interface should maintain its standard layout, fonts, and styling without obvious signs of browser developer tools (Inspect Element) being used to fake the 'Completed' status or field values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target business partner is 'Joe Block'. The payment amount must be exactly 1750.0. The check number is '20251547'. The tender type must be Check (internal code 'K'). The transaction must be an AR Receipt (isReceipt flag 'Y'). The final document status must be Completed (internal code 'CO').
